title: Slimum
description: A Splendid Slimes addon that adds slimes based on the Malum mod
body:
This [Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes) addon adds two new slimes based for the [Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum) mod, the **Soul Slime**, and the **Brilliant Slime**!

# Soul Slime:
**Diet**: Consumes every type of spirit, but seams to have a preference for Eldritch ones

**Behavior**:
- Because of all the souls stored inside of it, they will sometimes start levitating out of nowhere
- When happy, their aura will give the Earthen Might effect to those around them, but when mad their aura will Reject those near it

**Plorts**: Their Plort can turn into Soulstone

**How to get**: You can get Soul Slime Hearts by infusing any Slime Heart with 10 of each different type of spirit (except the eldritch one) and 4 Raw Soulsone

![An image of the Soul Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/529cb4df13bcbf06574754560be0ed652632fadd.png)

# Brilliant Slime:
**Diet**: Consumes every type of spirit, but seams to have a preference for Eldritch ones

**Behavior**:
- Because of all the souls stored inside of it, they will also sometimes start levitating out of nowhere
- When happy, their aura will make everyone around it glow, but when mad their aura will also Reject those near it

**Plorts**: Their Plort can turn into Brilliance

**How to get**: You can get Brilliant Slime Hearts by infusing any Slime Heart with 10 of each different type of spirit (except the eldritch one) and 4 clusters of brilliance

![An image of the Brilliant Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b28b422f7e37fcfe25cb0678abf0a79ffdeeed.png)

### Dependencies:
To use this addon, you'll need to have [Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes) and [Malum](https://modrinth.com/mod/malum) installed (obviously).

### Support:
If you have any suggestions or need any support with the addon, you can leave a comment or contact me directly through [my Discord](https://discord.com/users/lucasflin)! :D
